data.title: Rubrik Posts Strong Q4, But 'Rarified Air' Isn't Enough To Lift Shares In Soft Software Market
data.description: Rubrik Inc (NYSE: RBRK) experienced a decline in shares at the start of trading despite posting positive fiscal fourth-quarter results. Analysts provided their insights on the situation: Dan Ives from Wedbush maintained an Outperform rating but reduced the price target to $90. Jonathan Ruykhaver of Cantor Fitzgerald affirmed an Overweight rating with a $85 price target. Meanwhile, John DiFucci from Guggenheim Securities reiterated a Buy rating and a price target of $110. According to Wedbush, Rubrik surpassed expectations with significant growth in revenue, subscription ARR, and margins. Subscription ARR saw a 34% year-on-year increase to $1.46 billion, exceeding the estimated $1.44 billion. For further details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Campbell’s Appoints Joshua Levine Chief Investor Relations Officer
data.description: Camden, N.J. - Campbell’s Company (NASDAQ: CPB) has appointed Joshua Levine as Chief Investor Relations Officer, effective March 18, 2026. Levine will directly report to Chief Financial Officer Todd Cunfer. In his new role, Levine will be responsible for managing the Investor Relations function at Campbell’s, conducting interactions with the investment community, and ensuring clear and consistent communication with shareholders. He takes over from Rebecca Gardy, who recently retired from the position.

data.title: [MWC 2026] GlobalData vydává bílou knihu o vývoji hlasových technologií v éře umělé inteligence
data.description: In Barcelona, Spain on March 13, 2026, at the MWC 2026 trade show, Andy Hicks, the lead analyst at GlobalData, presented a white paper titled Reinventing Voice: A Converged, AI-Enabled, and Multimodal Voice Core for the Next Generation of Telecommunications. This white paper emphasizes the revolutionary advancements in voice technology for telecom, targeting the future with innovation.

data.title: ADDING and REPLACING Burckhardt Compression Appoints Alvaro Grande as New Head of Services, US
data.description: In Waller, Texas, Burckhardt Compression has appointed Alvaro Grande as the new Head of Services in the US. This strategic move is aimed at bolstering the service division in the country. Alvaro Grande's appointment marks a significant addition to the executive team and signifies the company's focus on enhancing its services in the US market. This announcement was made on March 12, 2026.

data.title: Blockchain technology accelerates payouts at U.S. online casinos, reducing withdrawal times significantly for players.
data.description: Historically, online casinos have been known for their sluggish withdrawal procedures, causing players to encounter delays in obtaining their winnings. This has led to frustrations among users trying to access their funds quickly.

data.title: Equitable Bank highlights efforts towards strengthening Canada's economy and communities in 2025 Public Accountability Statement
data.description: Equitable Bank unveiled its latest Public Accountability Statement for the fiscal year 2025 in Toronto on March 13, 2026. The report emphasizes the bank's dedication to enhancing Canada's financial landscape by fostering increased competition within the banking sector. This commitment is aimed at providing innovative solutions and enhancing value for marginalized communities. The PAS outlines Equitable Bank's efforts to drive positive change, with a focus on promoting diversity and inclusion. Through its initiatives, Equitable Bank seeks to contribute to the economic growth of Canada while ensuring transparency in its operations.

data.title: Bioretec Ltd's Financial Statements and Annual Report 2025 published
data.description: Bioretec Ltd, a company based in Tampere, Finland, announced on March 13, 2026, at 5:15 p.m., the release of its 2025 Financial Statements and Annual Report. These documents are now available in both Finnish and English. The company's financial performance for 2025 can be accessed in detail through these publications.
